understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to reach the '+' tile in each level to complete it, and ultimately win the game by finishing all levels in BP35.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement uses MOVE_LEFT, MOVE_RIGHT, MOVE_UP, MOVE_DOWN commands. Gravity is always active, pulling the player downward unless stopped by a block. Spike tiles end the run on contact. CLICK actions can remove clickable tiles (often blocks), potentially altering the level's layout and allowing the player to pass or fall. Each level has 2 attempts, with 50 turns per attempt. If an attempt fails, the level restarts and the failure is recorded.

Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to reach the '+' tile in each level to complete it, and ultimately win the game by finishing all levels in BP35.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement uses MOVE_LEFT, MOVE_RIGHT, MOVE_UP, MOVE_DOWN commands. Gravity is always active, pulling the player downward unless stopped by a block. Spike tiles end the run on contact. CLICK actions can remove clickable tiles (often blocks), potentially altering the level's layout and allowing the player to pass or fall. Each level has 2 attempts, with 50 turns per attempt. If an attempt fails, the level restarts and the failure is recorded.
